[{:keys [id title session-id metadata timeout-ms default-response] :as permission} on-response show-metadata?]
[{:keys [id title body placeholder multiline session-id] :as prompt} on-response auto-focus?]

[{:keys [permissions prompts on-permission-response on-prompt-response auto-focus-input show-metadata group-by-session] :or {permissions [] prompts [] auto-focus-input true show-metadata true group-by-session false} :as props}]
